story.iWant: to update message endpoints for branching support
story.soThat: messages can have parent-child relationships and support variation branches
story.tasks: - Add parent_message_id, branch_index, attachments, client_message_id fields to MessageDTO and MessageEntity (AC: #1, #7) - Update POST /api/threads/{id}/messages endpoint for branching support (AC: #2, #3, #4, #6) - Implement branch validation logic (max 9 variations per parent) (AC: #5) - Implement idempotency check on client_message_id (AC: #6) - Update GET /api/threads/{id}/messages endpoint to include branch info (AC: #1, #8) - Update error handling for message creation edge cases (AC: #4, #5, #6)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: MessageDTO includes new fields: parentMessageId, branchIndex, attachments, clientMessageId (per API §3.5)
POST /api/threads/{id}/messages accepts parentMessageId and branchIndex in request body
First message in thread can have null parentMessageId (root message)
Subsequent messages require valid parentMessageId that exists in same thread (validation error if invalid)
Branch index 0-9 accepted, values 10+ rejected with error "Maximum variation branches reached"
Duplicate clientMessageId returns existing message with 200 OK (idempotent, not 201 Created)
Attachments array serialized/deserialized correctly from JSONB [{fileId, filename, mimeType, sizeBytes}]
GET /api/threads/{id}/messages returns messages ordered by created_at for tree reconstruction

artifacts.docs: <doc path="docs/sprint-artifacts/tech-spec-epic-1.md" title="Epic 1 Technical Specification" section="Data Models - Desktop Message Entity (Updated)" snippet="New Phase 2 fields: parent_message_id UUID (nullable, self-referencing FK), branch_index INTEGER DEFAULT 0 (0=original, 1-9=variations), attachments JSONB [{fileId, filename, mimeType, sizeBytes, storageType}], client_message_id VARCHAR(255) for idempotency. CHECK constraints: role IN ('user', 'assistant', 'system'), branch_index >= 0 AND branch_index <= 9. UNIQUE INDEX on (thread_id, client_message_id) WHERE client_message_id IS NOT NULL." />

artifact.reason: Desktop Message interface - currently has clientMessageId, metadata fields - reference for expected structure (missing parentMessageId, branchIndex in current version)
Desktop ThreadRepository handles local message storage - reference for message data model
Existing message handling unit tests - reference for test patterns
Existing message state flow e2e tests - reference for integration testing messages

story-context.constraints: - **Repository Separation:** Moku API backend is SEPARATE repository. MessageController/Service/Repository implementation is in Moku API codebase, NOT in this desktop project. - **Message Branching Model:** Root messages: parentMessageId = null, branchIndex = 0. Child messages: parentMessageId points to parent, branchIndex indicates variation (0=original, 1-9=variations). Maximum 10 branches per parent (branch_index 0-9). Tree reconstruction: Client receives flat list ordered by created_at, reconstructs tree using parent references. - **Idempotency:** client_message_id is optional. If provided, duplicate requests return existing message with 200 OK (not 201 Created). Unique index on (thread_id, client_message_id) WHERE client_message_id IS NOT NULL prevents duplicates. Log idempotent hits for monitoring. - **Branch Validation:** branchIndex 0-9 accepted. Values 10+ rejected with 400 error "Maximum variation branches reached". Database CHECK constraint enforces range. Unique constraint on (parent_message_id, branch_index) prevents race conditions. - **Parent Validation:** parentMessageId must exist in same thread. Query MessageRepository to validate. Return 400 Bad Request if invalid or belongs to different thread. - **JSONB Attachments:** attachments column uses PostgreSQL JSONB type. Use @Type(JsonBinaryType.class) annotation in Hibernate. Structure: [{fileId, filename, mimeType, sizeBytes, storageType}]. Actual files stored in Storage Service (Epic 5), only metadata in message. - **Error Handling:** Return standardized error response format: {timestamp, status, error, message, errorCode, path}. Catch ConstraintViolationException → 409 Conflict. Catch DataIntegrityViolationException → 400 Bad Request. - **Dependency on E1-S1:** Database schema changes from E1-S1 must be applied first (V2.1 migration). New columns (parent_message_id, branch_index, attachments, client_message_id) must exist in database. Unique indexes and CHECK constraints must be in place.

interface.name: POST /api/threads/{id}/messages
interface.signature: POST /api/threads/{threadId}/messages Request: {content, parentMessageId?, branchIndex?, attachments?, clientMessageId?} → Response: MessageDTO (201 Created or 200 OK if idempotent)

interface.name: GET /api/threads/{id}/messages
interface.signature: GET /api/threads/{threadId}/messages → Response: [MessageDTO] ordered by created_at ASC for tree reconstruction

interface.name: MessageRepository.findByThreadIdAndClientMessageId()
interface.signature: Optional<Message> findByThreadIdAndClientMessageId(UUID threadId, String clientMessageId) - For idempotency check

interface.name: MessageRepository.findByThreadIdAndParentMessageId()
interface.signature: List<Message> findByThreadIdAndParentMessageId(UUID threadId, UUID parentMessageId) - For branch counting

tests.standards: Use JUnit 5 for test structure. Use Mockito 5.x for mocking services/repositories. Use Spring Boot Test with @SpringBootTest for integration tests. Use Testcontainers for PostgreSQL database. Test JSONB serialization: Create message with attachments array, save, read back, verify structure. Test idempotency: POST twice with same clientMessageId, verify second returns 200 with existing message. Test branch validation: Create 3 branches (0-9), attempt 4th, expect 400. Test parent validation: POST with invalid parentMessageId, expect 400.
tests.locations: moku-api/src/test/java/com/holokai/moku/ (unit and integration tests for Moku API backend)

test.idea: Unit test: MessageMapperTest verifying new fields (parentMessageId, branchIndex, attachments, clientMessageId) serialize/deserialize correctly

Unit test: AttachmentDTO JSONB serialization - create message with attachments [{fileId: 'f1', filename: 'doc.pdf', mimeType: 'application/pdf', sizeBytes: 1024}], save, read back, verify structure matches
Integration test: POST first message with null parentMessageId, expect 201 Created, verify parentMessageId null in response
Integration test: POST subsequent message with valid parentMessageId from same thread, expect 201
Integration test: POST message with invalid parentMessageId (non-existent UUID), expect 400 Bad Request with message 'Parent message not found in this thread'
Integration test: POST message with parentMessageId from different thread, expect 400
Integration test: POST message with branchIndex=10, expect 400 with error 'Maximum variation branches reached'
Integration test: Create message with branchIndex=0-9 for same parent, attempt 10th branch, expect 400
Integration test: Concurrent POST requests with same parent and branchIndex, verify unique constraint handled gracefully (one succeeds, one fails)
Integration test: POST message with clientMessageId='test-123', then POST again with same clientMessageId, first returns 201, second returns 200 with same message
Integration test: POST messages with null clientMessageId, verify both created as separate messages (idempotency skip)
Integration test: Verify idempotent hit logged in application logs (check for logger.debug with clientMessageId)
Integration test: Create messages out of order (by timestamp), GET /api/threads/{id}/messages, verify returned in created_at ASC order
Integration test: GET messages, verify parentMessageId and branchIndex fields present in response for child messages
Integration test: POST message with attachments array, GET message, verify attachments returned correctly
